SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is made and entered into on the 1st day of October 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. Alex Tan, NRIC No. S7654321D, residing at 123 Orchid Lane, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: alex.tan@example.sg (the "Seller"); and

2. GreenTech Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN 202312345G, having its registered office at 456 Innovation Drive, Singapore 678901, represented by Mr. John Lim, Director (the "Buyer").

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, 100,000 ordinary shares of EcoPower Solutions Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 (Singapore Dollars Five Hundred Thousand only), subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein.
